title: Job Opening Category Manager at Craftsvilla Global Group

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Craftsvilla Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the Craftsvilla Global Group family as a Category Manager in Aurangabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Craftsvilla Global Group:
Craftsvilla Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla Global Group!
